release_notes:
• Please download this update manually from GitHub, as the in-app updater may not function properly in this version.
  • MAJOR: Introduced Bootloader Security Bypass for automatic dm-verity disarming.
  • MAJOR: AVB Master Tool Suite added for cryptographic signing, verification, and Custom VBMeta Generation.
  • New: Intelligent custom workspace naming with integrated conflict resolution.
  • Fixed: Repack Threading issues stabilized.
